entry.title: Re: Step Into the Future with the SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Modernization Webcast Series
entry.content: hi @teresasanchez9 , webacst 7 is postponed to Q3 or Q3 2024. The registration link for webcast 8 will be available in a few days. You should get notified of the update

entry.title: Re: IBP to Datasphere with mass extraction of key figure...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud integration for data services (CI-DS) is bundled with IBP application license. Along with IBP , you will also be provisioned with CI-DS tenant .

Check out this blog on integrating SAP Datasphere with SAP IBP .

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/integrating-sap-datasphere-with-sap-integrated-business-planning-using-sap/ba-p/13643214

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh - Topic Filtering - SAP S4/Hana
entry.content: Yes, we are using event mesh and I have ${namespace}/ce/sap/s4/beh/+/v1/* for a particular queue where the subscriber will receive all events with outbound bindings in S4.

entry.title: Re: How to set entities via global JSON model
entry.content: Hi junwu, i edited my post. I included the this.setModel(oModel,"globalModel") as I have forgotten it. Still not working for me.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Business Objects 4.3 -- multiple environ...
entry.content:
Promoting content from a higher version of Business Objects to a lower one is not supported by SAP and it may not work at all.

We perform "side by side" upgrades.  By this I mean, we build new servers for the new version and migrate the content to the new servers for testing the upgrade version.  This leaves the old version as is for continued universe and report development.

You can migrate all of your content over to the upgraded servers once you are ready.

entry.title: Can not call Process Automation from Build Apps in preview (404)
entry.content:
SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Apps 

Hello,

I am trying to connect Build Apps with Process Automation. However I am facing some issues on destinations.

I have a free tier instances of Build Apps and Automation ( Free + Standard Instance) 

I have setup this destination as per the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/codejam-07-connect-app-process.html

I have implemented this dummy flow 

And on call it generates me the error : 

Would anyone have a clue on what did I miss ? 

Knowing that I am only in preview.

Thank you so much 

@Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: Is it not possible to perform inspection for incoming...
entry.content:
No, unfortunately this RF feature is only in decentral scenario (whoever might know why...)

Regards

Martin

entry.title: BAPI for transaction F-20
entry.content:
I need a BAPI for transaction F-20 so I don't need to use a Batch Input. Does anyone know of one?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Ajit,

ok, if the field "product compliance" is set to "yes" and the business feature "Dangerous Goods in the Value Chain" is aktive, and your issue still persists, you might want to check your Sales Document Type. We are not supporting all Sales Document Types. Please check the following IMG table in addition:

IMG: Product Compliance --> Integration --> Specify Excluded Document Types for Integration

Please be aware, not all Sales Document Types (end-to end processes) are supported by the Dangerous Goods solution, therefore those are excluded.

Another issue could be that you might be testing with a Product from the Best Practice Content of SDS or PMA, with those you cannot test the DG functionality.

Best Regards,
Marianne Sigmund

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements - Grid Table - Selection behaviour
entry.content:
Hi,

I have generated a Fiori Elements grid table display. In ui5 version 1.119.0 and above, the row selection to navigate to the object page seems to work only when you select the '>' icon in the end of the line item. 

In version 1.118.0 and lesser row selection was working like 'sap.ui.table.SelectionBehavior.Row'.

Is this no longer possible in Grid Table. I have generated a simple App to demonstrate this issue.

https://github.com/Udineshsap13/CAPDraftIssue/blob/master/CAPIssue/app/erpcapissue/webapp/manifest.json

Can you please let me know if there is some configuration in Manifest which I am missing.

Thanks,

Dinesh

entry.title: Re: Freight Settlement from TM module to CO-PA
entry.content:
Hello Team, I am looking for some help to validate if below is the accounting standard when posting FSD document from TM to ECC. Also, is it true that with use of ABD, there are 2 intermediate GL account i.e. GL accounts 150500000 and 159130001, the reason for asking it because when we post the invoice document less than the accrual amount (-ve value clearing), there is a balance under 150500000  is not getting cleared automatically. Our accounting team from the business is asking us if there is a need for such accounting posting with 2 intermediate accounts. I have searched all possible help file, SAP support portal and I didn't find SAP standards related to accounting with TM integration to ECC and invoice posting against the TM Freight PO.  

I am looking for expertise who can validate these accountings.

entry.title: Re: SAP Code Vulnerability Analyzer (CVA) - FAQs
entry.content:
Very useful blog post even after some years.

Could you please verify verify and in case confirm the material code for the CVA installed in the S/4HANA system. The article points to SKU 7019502 but it seems deprecated.

Thanks a lot in advance

entry.title: ACRONYMS IN THE GROUPS FOR TAXBLE EVENTS
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question about some acronyms in the descriptions of the groups for taxable envents in SAP Business ByDesign.

Within the business configuration > Chart of Accounts: Charts of Accounts, Financial Reporting Structures, Account Determination > Account Determination Groups > Tax > Groups for Taxable Events, I have a series of account determination groups and in some of them the acronyms appear in their descriptions: BA.

9031 - BA - Import Sales / Purchases Tax - Services

9070 - BA - Domestic Supply / Acquisitions - Down Payments

9080 - BA - Own Consumption

9090 - BA - Domestic Supply - Non-Taxpayers

Could anyone tell me what exactly they mean?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Downloading excel or pdf file on click of a custom button using RAP in BTP
entry.content: The virtual template gets updated after you click the hyperlink of the download file. It will call the virtual element calculation class one more time.

entry.title: Re: Copy Recipient from MB1A / MIGO to EWM Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

as the field MSEG-WEMPF has no counterpart in LIPS, this value is not copied in standard to ERP outbound delivery (and further, it is not replicated to EWM, obviously).

So, the first task is to to get it into LIPS. Finally, during posting GI, this value has to be copied into MSEG again.

Please check the Note

358828 - Fields from MBxx missing in delivery and MM document

Regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Integration between IBP and Databricks
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no direct integration available between IBP and Databricks at the moment in the current middlewares. But you can always leverage the CI-DS or SAP Cloud Integration Suite to push data from SAP IBP into AWS S3.

If you use the Cloud Integration Suite - you can push the data to an S3 Bucket using standard request/reply adapters. Part of this blog can provide you some ideas:-  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/writing-forecast-data-to-snowflake-from-sap-integrated-business-planning/ba-p/13622578 

Once data is on an S3 bucket you can move this to Databricks. On the Databricks side ,you can either Onboard the data or use the COPY INTO functionality. Both are described in: https://docs.databricks.com/en/ingestion/onboard-data.html

entry.title: Re: My experience at the SAP Inside Track Barcelona
entry.content: Excellent. Great event!

entry.title: Unleash Transformational Success with SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager!
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio community,

We are thrilled to introduce our brand-new e-learning course: "Introducing SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager​".

This course could be your first step into the world of process transformation management, guided by the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager.

You'll gain insights into our product vision and capabilities, topped off with a concise product demo. It's your golden ticket to understanding and leveraging SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager in all your transformation projects. Grab this fantastic opportunity and let's start transforming together!

Ready to dive in? Follow this link to start your journey. (Membership in SAP Enterprise Support Academy is required.)

If you are not yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, please join via the following link.

E-Learning "Introducing SAP Signavio ​ Process Transformation Manager​"

And remember, this is your first sneak peek into the product. Stay tuned for more to come.

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!

We have created process order for quantity 42 CAS and and order is TECO inspection lot with 04 origin is created with quantity 42 CAS.

Please find below screenshots.

Two inspection lot generated for same batch see screenshot below with different UOM we have problem with CAS Lot.

While performing the UD we are getting the below error as we checked the qty 761,040 KG is available for batch in MMBE stock is in Quality inspection.

Could you please help to resolved this issue.

Thanks in advance for your support,

Best Regards,

Varad

entry.title: Re: In Subscription Billing, what is diff between Custom...
entry.content:
Hi,

some best practices for your scenarios/use cases are:

  1. Accepting the fields in Usage and use them in price calculation
    -> use "item fields" in the usage record defined in the rate element on usage record level. They are meant to impact pricing!
    See also https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/feature-overview/rate-elements?locale=en-US#loio64c02aeb1a5f4ecebfb64d5a2082baaf__section_individual_usage_rating

  2. Accepting the fields in Usage and use them in billing events as informative field(no logics on the field, only pass through)
    -> Use custom references for the usage records

  3. Accepting fields in Subscription through contract creation
    -> You can use both custom reference (header + item level) or product configuration (only item level) based on your needs. Good description of the impact of pricing can be found here:
    https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/feature-overview/prices-from-pricing-scheme?locale=en-US#pricing-based-on-custom-attributes

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: which hana database monitoring view gives full path o...
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud Monitoring views are documented in the SQL Reference Guide.  

As an example, the monitoring view M_Backup_Catalog_Files, is documented at M_BACKUP_CATALOG_FILES System View

entry.title: Re: Material Alternative Unit of Measure Conversion in Da...
entry.content:
Hi Martin, Thanks for the response. We have implemented a similar approach of using a sql table function to explode all the possible combinations of Unit From/To with calculated ratios. This is then left joined to the fact table for KPI conversion. While it works, it is messy and a lot to keep track of from a support perspective.

Also, I took your note and opened a Customer Influence Council request for this basic functionality available in BW to be replicated into DataSpere.  If you are reading this post, please vote for the feature here:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/324165

entry.title: SUM upgrade: OTEXERM1600_600.SAR atribute change file is not available for download
entry.content:
Hello,

While MP brings the OTEXERM1600_600.SAR Attribute Change Package 01 for OpenText Employee File Managment RM 1600_600 l001 within the stack.xml and transaction plan,  pushing data files to Download basket  ignores this file  and therefore is not present in download folder.

SUM Error state Current Phase: PREP_EXTRACT/SCAN_DOWNLOADDIR: Stack Archive Verification

Following stack archives are not available in the download directory:

/imp/............./Download/OTEXERM1600_600.SAR

4 Kb attribute file cannot be found in Software Download

If you ever met with such situation, please advise.

Thank you!

You can see the screenshots that I took. Click on the arrow, navigate to the item enter the information. Or as I said Option 2, which I would propose anyway in your case. Best, Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Issues with Horizon theme in Company Structure Overview
entry.content:
@ugurkaratas, I noticed today that the side color bars are back, so at least the first issue I raised has been resolved:

Now hopefully SAP will also improve the Position icon.

Jay

entry.title: Unlock the full potential of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere have revolutionized the way how the traditional SAP analytics and data warehousing businesses operate. Compared to the classic BW and BusinessObjects, the SAP Business Technology Platform offer benefits that drive efficiency, scalability, and innovations.

" Sometimes the cloud applications are seen as too close for the customizations and very distant to the ad-hoc development, especially if it's compared to the traditional ABAP development or with the BO SDK."

This is not true!

This article is born by the experience on the field from the SAP Services Adoption Center, that supports everyday partners and customers to get the best out of the SAP Business Technology Platform; In this blog we are going to unveil some very important customization points that you should know while implementing projects for the enterpise. 

In the context of SAP BTP analytics and data management, hardcore development represents a way to solve complex requirements where there is no "out of the box" functionality available; developers wants to push the boundaries of technology to create robust, high-performance, and scalable solutions. This type of development is characterized by a relentless focus on optimizing code, deep understanding of the cloud infrastructure interaction, and the ability to solve complex problems under extreme constraints. Whether it's building a tailored UI components for SAP Analytics Cloud or developing interactive applications for SAP Datasphere, this blog will offer a good collection of use cases that you can easily reuse.

 

The following collection of advanced use cases is going to be regularly updated. Stay tuned !

  • SAP Datasphere News in May

 

 

Push SAP Analytics Cloud to the next levelPush SAP Datasphere to the next level

Realize your custom widget 

Now that Custom Widget is available with the Unified Story Experience since QRC/Q2 - 2023, and Widget Add-Ons since QRC/Q4 - 2023, we received a large amount of requests coming from SAC users searching for Samples in order to extend the Built-in set of visualisations in SAC.

  • SAP Public GitHub repository
  • Custom Widget Hands-on Guide
  • Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
  • Demystifying Custom Widgets for SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Diving into Custom Widgets with SAP Analytics Cloud

Boost the integration

SAP Analytics Cloud is extremely efficient when it's combinated with SAP Datasphere, here a collection of plug and play usecasaes

  • KPI-Dashboard with SAC and Datasphere
  • Extending SAC Planning - Acessing planning data with SAP Datasphere

Work with the API

The API allows third-party applications to access data stored on an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant. The API is best used for requesting small amounts of data in real time. You must have a tenant URL and SAP Analytics Cloud user. You must also configure OAuth to work with your application before you can use the REST API

  • Official guide from SAP Help
  • APIs: Getting Started Guide
  • Openness and flexibility with SAP Analytics Cloud’s APIs for data import and export ( Devtoberfest Sep 2023 )
  • Consume SAP APIs using oAuth and Node on GitHub code
  • Consume SAP APIs using oAuth and Hana XSA as  Community article

 

Use the power of Hana Cloud

  • Use the Datasphere data in BTP by sharing your space data 

 

The power of CLI

The SAP Datasphere Command Line Interface is a powerfull tool to interact with Dataphere not using the regular web interface but using your terminal. This approach gives you massive benefits in terms of rapidity and automations.

  • Official guide from SAP Help
  • Command-Line Interface for SAP Datasphere: Overview
  • Transformation Flow partition generation with SAP Datasphere CLI

Realize your own application & Integration

SAP Datasphere can be integrated with SAP Buid, SAP Build Code and SAP Business Application Studio to realize amazing applications on your data with read\write options.

  • Enable end-user data entry into SAP Datasphere via SAP Build Apps
  • Integrating with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs using SAML Bearer Assertion

entry.title: Re: setIgnoredElement returning comma in json payload
entry.content: Check Note: 3269616 - PO REST Adapter conversion from XML to JSON with setIgnoredElements leaves a comma in the output

Hi,

Did You Solve?

 

Thank You 

Best Regards

entry.title: Please add new column (GST Emailid) after EmailId column in vendor master report.
entry.content: Please add new column (GST Email id) after Email Id column in vendor master report. This new column (GST Email id) should capture multiple email id’s whatever given at BP Master (Address – Independent Communication) Table.

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Qual formato devemos seguir para o próximo encontro SAP Meet up? Compartilhe suas Preferências
entry.content:
A seguir, apresentamos algumas modalidades de eventos e encontros que podem beneficiar a Comunidade SAP e os profissionais da Área. Comentem e contem qual o formato de Meet Up vocês preferem?:

Palestra SAP - Uma apresentação individual ou em grupo focada em um tópico específico do SAP, onde especialistas compartilham seus conhecimentos e experiências com a audiência, seja em universidades, empresa ou locais específicos. 

Encontro de Profissionais SAP - Reuniões informais onde profissionais de SAP podem se encontrar para discutir tendências, desafios e soluções em suas áreas de atuação.

Workshop SAP - Sessões interativas e práticas onde os participantes podem aprender novas habilidades ou aprofundar seus conhecimentos em aspectos específicos do SAP.

Webinar SAP - Seminários online que permitem aos participantes aprender e interagir com especialistas SAP de qualquer lugar do mundo, oferecendo flexibilidade e conveniência.

Hackathon SAP - Eventos colaborativos onde desenvolvedores e consultores SAP se reúnem para resolver problemas ou criar novas soluções em um ambiente competitivo e de alta energia.

Conferência SAP - Grandes eventos que reúnem milhares de profissionais SAP, com várias sessões simultâneas, keynotes de líderes da indústria e amplas oportunidades de networking.

Fórum de Discussão SAP - Plataformas online ou reuniões presenciais onde profissionais podem debater questões específicas, trocar ideias e buscar soluções colaborativas.

Mesa Redonda SAP - Discussões focadas e profundas sobre tópicos relevantes, com a participação de um grupo seleto de especialistas e participantes interessados.

Happy Hour - Encontros locais organizados por e para a comunidade SAP, geralmente em um ambiente informal, para troca de experiências e networking.

Bootcamp SAP - Programas intensivos de treinamento, que podem durar de alguns dias a várias semanas, focados em fornecer habilidades práticas e avançadas em SAP.

Sessão de Mentoria SAP - Encontros individuais ou em pequenos grupos onde mentores experientes guiam profissionais mais novos ou menos experientes através de desafios e desenvolvimento de carreira.

Evento de Networking SAP - Reuniões focadas em construir e expandir a rede de contatos profissionais entre os participantes, proporcionando oportunidades de colaboração e parcerias.

Seminário SAP - Sessões educativas focadas em tópicos específicos de interesse, geralmente com a presença de palestrantes convidados e especialistas da área.

entry.title: INTRASTAT - Condition GRWR is determined in pricing but not in the INTRASTAT report.
entry.content:
This request for assistance applies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

It's not possible to determine the Statistical Value in the INTRASTAT report and file. I have checked note 2873326 - KBA: Statistical value is missing in INTRASTAT reporting for countries, but I still can't understand why I am having this issue.

The condition GRWR is correctly determined in the pricing procedure in the billing document but is missing in the INTRASTAT reporting.

I would appreciate it if someone could help.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP CI XI Adapter Exception Handling

entry.title: Re: How to send data's SAP Environment Management Module...
entry.content:
Hi @tam123,

For S/4HANA On-Prem or Cloud both can be integrated as connections in Datasphere, see the list of available connection types: Integrating Data via Connections.
For Datasphere content check out SAP Sustainability Control Tower Integration.

BR.

entry.title: Re: Inbound Delivery: Inbound WHSCON IDoc with Batch Split - HowTo...?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have also faced this issue today and it took me a few hours to reach a solution.

After investigation ; 
SAP is doing a collect on  batch numbers lines/POsnr despite you have tried to specify LGORT in following preparation : EXIT_SAPLV55K_002

Mostly since he does not plan to care about LGORT In standard following this EXIT.
Which means : 

SAP Is reforming a XLIPS table to prepare future LIPS insertion, right after that exit and no badi/other exit seems to exist
Here is my technical solution to avoid implicit enhancement after that analysis:

At every POSNR_VL, check if you encounter several times the same batch number as you have entered multiples lines in your WHSCON idoc using QUA and BAS qualifiers.

For every CHARG/ Batch number, that is refered more than once on a same item,  modify the batch number and give it a fictiv one in the prepared_item internal table of the exit. Store The changes in memory or use a table declared as a class-attribute for your work instance and fill it during the swap in that exit.

Implement BADI : LE_SHP_DELIVERY_UPDATE METHOD CHANGE ITEMS.
Read your table attribute with key  POSNR_VL = lips-posnr CHARG = yourfictifCHARG and retrieve the right batch Number. Swap the right Batch number with fictiv one before commit in the method listed above.

Let me know if it has helped, also let me know if i would have missed anything!

Regards

Victor Sauvageot

entry.title: Dimension Members are not appearing based on Validation Rules
entry.content:
Hello,

I have updated Master Data Validation Rules in Planning Model. But in story, the dimension values are not appearing based validation rules. 

Ex, When I select Company Code, I am expecting to show respective Sales Groups based on validation rules. But it showing Sales Group Dimension members  "ALL".  I selected Cascading Effect, still not working.

Company Code dimension is Story Filter and Sales Group Dimension is Input Control in the Story.

Please let me know how to achieve required functionality.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Why does SAP Business Objects only support UTF8 characters? 4.3 SP4 release
entry.content:
We recently attempted to upgrade to Business Objects 4.3 SP4 only to notice errors when trying to add users subsequent patch releases we got same error. I finally found this note 0003437779  . Our oracle db is 19c and some have NLS_CHARACTERSET as UTF8 and some dont (WE8MSWIN1252), just curious as to why with Sp4 this is all of a sudden breaking when SP3 P9 works fine with non-unicode and if SAP has any plans to allow non-unicode (our dba's would like to know why they need to fix this). I could not find an SAP note on to why Sp4 is special and why it has to be UTF8 only.
SAP BusinessObjects - Platform Administration 
SAP BusinessObjects - Authentication 

thank you

entry.title: Re: Wrong GL is debited in Landing Cost JE
entry.content: When landed cost is posted to price difference account, it is usually because the item is no longer in stock. Maybe you moved the item to a different warehouse? Either that, or you have a different batch in stock than the one that was purchased.

entry.title: Purchase Order Display Open Purchase Order's.

Is there a standard report where i want to see  PO due date by Item Qty and Value. Below is the requirment.

entry.title: Re: SAP CI XI Adapter Exception Handling

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content:
There is a new branding SDK that you should use with 22405 metadata that should contain the fix for this issue

https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter/template/products/%20_APP=00200682500000001943&_EVENT=DISPHIER&HEADER=Y&FUNCTIONBAR=N&EVENT=TREE&NE=NAVIGATE&ENR=73554900100200022933&V=MAINT&TA=ACTUAL&PAGE=SEARCH/SVC%20ASSET%20MGR%20BRAND%20SDK%202405

entry.title: Re: Fiori Development with VSCode and NodeJS
entry.content: Excellent tutorial. No fluff and straight to the point. Thank you very much, it helped me a lot.

entry.title: Re: A very strange SQL requirement
entry.content:
Hello @ekekakos ,

You can use CTE's if your abap version is above 7.51. Then you will be able to use the distinct operator on the dates and a cross join with the airlines.
This is also doable without cte's. By fetching the data and looping over each date and every airline. I have included both methods.

CLASS zcl_flights DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_alv,
              carrid TYPE /dmo/carrier_id,
              fldate TYPE /dmo/flight_date,
              name   TYPE /dmo/first_name,
            END OF ty_alv.

    TYPES tt_alv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_alv WITH EMPTY KEY.

    METHODS constructor.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.

    DATA gt_flights TYPE tt_alv.

    METHODS get_flights_with_cte
      RETURNING VALUE(rt_flights) TYPE tt_alv.

    METHODS get_flights_with_abap
      RETURNING VALUE(rt_flights) TYPE tt_alv.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_flights IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_flights_with_cte.

    WITH

    +lt_distinct_flight_dates AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            fldate
        FROM
            zek_sbook
    ),

    +lt_date_carrier_cross_product AS (
        SELECT
            a~carrid,
            d~fldate
        FROM
            zek_scarr AS a
        CROSS JOIN
            +lt_distinct_flight_dates AS d
    ),

    +lt_result AS (
        SELECT
            f~carrid,
            f~fldate,
            a~name
        FROM
            +lt_date_carrier_cross_product AS f
        LEFT OUTER JOIN
            zek_sbook AS a
        ON
            f~carrid = a~carrid AND
            f~fldate = a~fldate
    )

    SELECT * FROM +lt_result ORDER BY fldate, carrid INTO TABLE @rt_flights.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_flights_with_abap.

    SELECT * FROM zek_sbook INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_bookings).

    SELECT carrid FROM zek_scarr ORDER BY carrid INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_carriers).

    SELECT fldate FROM zek_sbook ORDER BY fldate INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_dates).

    DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_dates COMPARING fldate.

    LOOP AT lt_dates INTO DATA(lv_date).
      LOOP AT lt_carriers INTO DATA(lv_carrier).

        APPEND VALUE ty_alv(
            carrid = lv_carrier
            fldate = lv_date
            name   = COND #( 
                        WHEN line_exists( lt_bookings[ carrid = lv_carrier fldate = lv_date ] )
                        THEN lt_bookings[ carrid = lv_carrier fldate = lv_date ]-name
                     )
        ) TO rt_flights.

      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

 Below is the local test class so you can inject test data and check yourself.

*"* use this source file for your ABAP unit test classes
CLASS ltc_flights DEFINITION FOR TESTING
 RISK LEVEL HARMLESS
 DURATION SHORT.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    DATA mo_cut TYPE REF TO zcl_flights.

    CLASS-DATA go_sql_enviroment TYPE REF TO if_osql_test_environment.

    CLASS-METHODS class_setup.
    CLASS-METHODS class_teardown.
    METHODS setup.
    METHODS teardown.

    METHODS test_flights_with_cte  FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
    METHODS test_flights_with_abap FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_flights DEFINITION LOCAL FRIENDS ltc_flights.

CLASS ltc_flights IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD class_setup.
    go_sql_enviroment =
      cl_osql_test_environment=>create(
      i_dependency_list = VALUE #( ( 'ZEK_SBOOK' ) ( 'ZEK_SCARR' ) )
    ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD class_teardown.
    go_sql_enviroment->destroy( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD setup.
    mo_cut = NEW #(  ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD teardown.
    go_sql_enviroment->clear_doubles(  ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD test_flights_with_cte.
    DATA lt_expected TYPE zcl_flights=>tt_alv.
    DATA lt_bookings TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zek_sbook.
    DATA lt_carriers TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zek_scarr.

    lt_bookings = VALUE #(
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'ELIAS' seats = 5 )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'MARIA' seats = 2 )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = 'JOHN'  seats = 3 )
    ).

    lt_carriers = VALUE #(
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' air_name = 'AIRLINE_1' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AB' air_name = 'AIRLINE_2' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AF' air_name = 'AIRLINE_3' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'BE' air_name = 'AIRLINE_4' )
    ).

    go_sql_enviroment->insert_test_data(
      EXPORTING
        i_data = lt_bookings
    ).

    go_sql_enviroment->insert_test_data(
      EXPORTING
        i_data = lt_carriers
    ).

    lt_expected = VALUE #(
        ( carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'ELIAS' )
        ( carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'MARIA' )
        ( carrid = 'AF' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'BE' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = 'JOHN' )
        ( carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'AF' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'BE' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
    ).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      EXPORTING
        act = mo_cut->get_flights_with_cte( )
        exp = lt_expected
    ).

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD test_flights_with_abap.
    DATA lt_expected TYPE zcl_flights=>tt_alv.
    DATA lt_bookings TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zek_sbook.
    DATA lt_carriers TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zek_scarr.

    lt_bookings = VALUE #(
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'ELIAS' seats = 5 )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'MARIA' seats = 2 )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = 'JOHN'  seats = 3 )
    ).

    lt_carriers = VALUE #(
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AA' air_name = 'AIRLINE_1' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AB' air_name = 'AIRLINE_2' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'AF' air_name = 'AIRLINE_3' )
        ( client = 100 carrid = 'BE' air_name = 'AIRLINE_4' )
    ).

    go_sql_enviroment->insert_test_data(
      EXPORTING
        i_data = lt_bookings
    ).

    go_sql_enviroment->insert_test_data(
      EXPORTING
        i_data = lt_carriers
    ).

    lt_expected = VALUE #(
        ( carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'ELIAS' )
        ( carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = 'MARIA' )
        ( carrid = 'AF' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'BE' fldate = CONV #( '20240530' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'AA' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = 'JOHN' )
        ( carrid = 'AB' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'AF' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
        ( carrid = 'BE' fldate = CONV #( '20240531' ) name = '' )
    ).


    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      EXPORTING
        act = mo_cut->get_flights_with_abap( )
        exp = lt_expected
    ).

  ENDMETHOD.


ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Resources displayed to the Resource Manager
entry.content:
Hi Francis,

Resource Management for Projects is used to monitor aggregated KPIs for the resources and resource requests for which you are responsible. It is your central point of access to other apps for resource management.

Please refer to the below SAP Help Documentation for more information

Resource Management

Thanks,

Monisha.

entry.title: Re: Unable to import BPA project to CoE tenant
entry.content: I have de same problem, would you have a solution ?

Hi All,

I would like to read the value XXXXX in the below string

<String1><DbtrAcct><Id><Other><Id>XXXXX</Id><String2>

Is there any string function that i can use to read. BTW, this will be multiple times.

Regards,

Salil

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 5
entry.content: Here is my Week 5 Submission!

entry.title: What to do if monospace characters in SAP GUI become 'ugly'
entry.content:
As an SAP support engineer, I frequently access many different systems a day.

And I suppose that it is after accessing a system that SAP GUI settings change in such a way that an annoying font starts appearing as the default one for monospace characters.

In the first time the issue happened to me, it took many months for the font to return to normal.

In the second time, I didn't count on patience but instead tried to figure out what was going on.
It was particularly frustrating because not even font settings for SAP GUI would solve the case!
Fortunately, I found the answer and I'd like to publicly share it in this blog post.

Root cause is that the character set for SAP GUI changed.

You can check this discussion to understand the problem of how Eastern characters and Western characters do not have matching "shapes".
While Western characters can be as thin as "I", Eastern characters tend to have equal widths.
And so, it is particularly challenging to find a monospace font that handles both Eastern and Western characters very well.

As you can see, the resulting font disposition for SAP GUI is not aesthetically pleasing.

In other words, it seems ugly! How to get rid of that?

1) Go to program regedit:

2) Go to path HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI
Front\SAP Frontend Server\FontSettings\ and set CurrentCharSet to 0:

In my case, it was set as 129 (Korean) before. Number 0 stands for 'West European', which is probably the same one you're looking for.

Otherwise, you can check page 33 of this documentation for other character sets.
That page also explains the REGEDIT setting above.

entry.title: How to automatically release a maintenance order when it is created?
entry.content:
Good afternoon people.

I need to create a Maintenance Order (PM) with the system status already released.
What would the configuration be like?


Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Adapt UI activate and publish button not enabled - S4...
entry.content:
Dear Raavi,

 

The buttons are only available when you make changes to the UI. 

You can see in the screenshot that the status of the UI is "Original App", this status means that no changes were made.

When you make changes to the UI, the status changes to "Draft" and the button "Activate new version" will be available.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: SAP BTP - Cloud vs ON premise
entry.content: Does SAP BTP exclusively integrate with cloud-based solutions or does it also support on-premise solutions?

entry.title: Re: Set up SAP Generative AI Hub in an SAP BTP Enterprise Account and Consume Generative AI Model
entry.content: The destination and normal testing in SAPUI5 is not working. Do you have any blogs for SAPUI5 integration with this?

entry.title: Re: Not authorized to create custom business object ZZ1_Y...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Have you checked if your business role is with "Write Access" restriction set as "Unrestricted"?

If the role is "Write Access: No Access" you'll not be able to create the Business Object.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Read substring
entry.content: try xslt

entry.title: Re: how to check business catalog to be assigned For cust...
entry.content:
Dear Ruchi,

 

You need to assign one or more Business Catalogs to the Custom Catalog Extension related to the Application.

You can choose any Business Catalog that you want. It can either be a catalog related to Extensibility/Custom Analytical Queries or a catalog related to the datasources that you're using.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Cloud vs ON premise
entry.content: depends on what support you mean.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Cloud vs ON premise
entry.content: Does Personas machine learning, artificial intelligence or chatbots in BTP are only available through cloud? or are they also available on premise

entry.content:
Hello,

Our Functional Location edit mask is XX-XXXX-XXX. However, in some cases second hierarchy has only 3 characters (Ex: US-ABC-XYZ) and in most of the cases second level hierarchy has 4 characters inline with edit mast (Ex: US-ABCD-WVX). Is it possible to achieve both variations with same edit mask? 

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Copy Value from one Dimension Member to another Dimension Member in runtime
entry.content:
Hi friends, 

my requirement is to mirror the value on a specific G/L Account to another G/L Account. 

So the scenario is like this:

The planner Enters a value on G/L Account A. The SAC now copies/mirrors the value to G/L Account B in runtime. 

I have following idea:

OnResultChanged-Event:

var resultSet = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultSet();
console.log(resultSet);
for (var i = 0; i < resultSet.length; i++)
{
var value=resultSet[i]["G/L_Account"].rawValue;
var conv_value=ConvertUtils.stringToInteger(value);

if (conv_value!==0)
{
DataACtion_1.execute();

Iam wondering if I can restrict this Script explicit to G/L Account A. So only when the Value on A is changed the Data Action is executed.

Any ideas on this?

Kind regards,

Ismail

Hi Gayathri,
Thank you for sharing your issue. Could you clarify if you have checked the permissions for the folders you created? Also, have you tried adjusting the navigation settings in the KM iView? If you have any additional details about how your iView is set up or any error messages that appear, it would be helpful to share them for more precise assistance.
Thanks!

entry.title: Using action!restart to Replay a Simulation
entry.content: Using a simulation template, with start and end book pages...action!restart syntax takes you to the start bookpage.  What syntax will restart the simulation from the first step?

entry.title: Re: Unlock the full potential of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @MaurizioSantoro,

Feeling and experience when using cloud applications like SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere yes, as you explained - it's a lot of customization but very little add-hoc development. I agree with you that the statement should not be true! The cloud apps have lots of ad-hoc development capabilities with code or without code (visual). On the other hand, we need to think about why experience is not well taken especially for admins and developers. Because cloud apps like that if everything works it's fine, but if something is wrong God may help you. It means that monitoring and error mechanism and troubleshooting support are missing some valuable user experience. You cannot debug the cloud application. That's fine, but at least we deserve better error and log documentation for troubleshooting, etc. That's one thing that is still -I guess- valid for about the cloud apps, though there are a lot of improvements release by release.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Customized fields at Case management of FSCM
entry.content:
Hi Jigang,

I followed below steps to trigger the BADI - UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN.

Issue: In my case, we recently migrated to S4. When user tries to use search criteria on field 'Next Date' nothing was showing up.

Solution:

First we need to update the values in UKM_DCD_ATTR table using BADI - UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN~MAINTAIN.

1) Go to SE38 and keep the external break point for user 'SAP_WFRT'.
 2) Go to class 'CL_UKM_DCD_WF_EVENT', click on display, put the break point in method - BI_EVENT_HANDLER_STATIC~ON_EVENT.
3) Go to class method ->cl_ukm_xi_facade=>if_ukm_dcd_push-push_dcd  ( line no 56 ).
4) BADI 'UKM_DCD_MAINTAIN' gets triggered after sales order saved and DB updates.

  Update the structure cs_add_attributes-CMNGV1 value then table UKM_DCD_ATTR gets updated.

Thank You,

Srini.

entry.title: Re: Variant Configuration tables

entry.title: Re: Payment Term configuration not obtaining the desired...
entry.content:
Hi,

Your term from Document date is "Net 30 days on the 10th of the month".

In tx. OBB8, you may try to configure a term with settings in the "Payment Terms" section as

Percentage: 0,000

No. of Days: 30

Fixed Day: 10

Additional months: 0 

Note that under "Baseline date for calculation", "Fixed Date" and  "Additional Months" should be left as '0' and the "Default for baseline date" should be the Document Date.

In this way, your actual calculated due date would be the 10th and could vary between 30 to 59 days from Document date.

Kind regards,

Georgios

entry.title: Remove the completed status of an operation when canceling activity confirmation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to know if it's possible to remove the completed status of an operation when canceling an activity confirmation in Manage Cancellations since currently the status is not removed so it's not possible to post activity confirmations since the operation is still completed.

I already read the following link but there is no information about it: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/cancelling-activity-confirmations

Neto

entry.title: Re: Mark Prices of Actual Costing Ledger Run error
entry.content:
Hi Omega,

The “Mark Prices” step in the “Edit Actual Costing Runs” App is only available in the future. The specified period and year must be in the future, relative to today's date, not based on any other date parameters that might be used in the system. Since in your screens you’re using period 3 the system is issuing the error message “Marking date is in the past” (C+406) to let you know that is not possible to run the step using March 2024. In order to execute the step you would have to use July 2024 (since we’re in June).

That said, even when the system can use actual cost and perform this step every period, is common to see that the prices are Marked just once every year to keep stability in the Standard prices.

For more information I recommend you to follow (at least) the Test Script of the scope item Actual Costing (33Q) Please note that I'm sharing the link to the US, if you're using a different country please update it once you open the link.

I hope this helps.

 

Ernesto Cepeda

entry.title: Joining two outbound deliveries / picking two outbound deliveries to one handling unit (SAP EWM)
entry.content:
Hello

I have two oubound deliveries that were created in external system. They are for the same client, same delivery date etc. They were created as seperate deliveries because external system calculated that they have to be picked on two Handling Units due to volume limit. 

Let's say that I know that it is possible to pick all items from both deliveries into one HU. Is it possible to join (merge) them so they would be picked in one Warehouse Order on one HU?

Or maybe is is possible to move items from one delivery to another?

entry.title: The In-App Help Panel (Widget) for Ariba Guided Buying does not load
entry.content:
For Ariba SLP and Buying, we have enabled the SAP Companion In-App Help. For Ariba SLP, it works fine. However, for Buying, when I click the Question mark (Help) icon, the Help panel is not loaded. I tried different screens in the Ariba Buying application, but the In-App Help Panel does not load. 

I checked the details in the Workarea in SAP Enable Now Manager; everything looks fine. Any possible reason this happens?

entry.title: Architecting Success: Navigating successful SAP Enterprise Architect Certification(SAP EA) Journey
entry.content:
Enterprise architects play a vital role in guiding customer leaders through the digital transformation journey, offering expertise in both business and IT transformation. This requires proficiency in understanding new business models and the ability to discuss technology stacks, including Cloud, landscape strategy, Artificial intelligence, Internet of Things, and more.

In support of companies looking to future-proof their technology environments, SAP introduced the SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect certification last year. I successfully passed the exam with curated preparation. I have since received inquiries from SAP consultants worldwide seeking guidance on how to prepare for the exam. I thought of writing this article which can be beneficial for fellow consultants and architects who want to embark on this journey.

Undoubtedly, this certification is exceptionally challenging due to two main factors:

  • The extensive range of concepts covered in the exam, encompasses SAP Enterprise architecture methodology, SAP EA tools, Business architecture, Data architecture, Technology architecture, Application architecture, and more.
  • The passing score required for certification is set at 80%.

About the Exam

The examination comprises 40 questions divided into two sections: the initial section consists of 22 multiple-choice questions, while the subsequent section consists of 18 questions centered around a case study.

For more information about the exam, including details and a guide, please refer to the link below. It provides insights into skill areas along with weightage and the Wanderlust case study.

https://learning.sap.com/enterprise-architect

Skill Areas measured and its weightage:

SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework and Toolset 20-30 %

Architecture Vision and Roadmap 20-30 %

Business Architecture 20-30 %

Data, Application, and Technology Architecture 20-30%

Exam preparation recommendations and guides

While not mandatory, it is advisable to pursue TOGAF certification before undertaking the SAP Enterprise Architect certification since the SAP EA framework is constructed upon TOGAF. A solid grasp of the architecture framework and Architecture Development Method is essential.

There is a recommended training course, (SAP Intelligent enterprise-Architecture foundation). I could not find time to go through this training but I successfully passed the exam through the following preparation.

SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework(SAP EAF) and Toolset

  • A clear understanding of SAP EA Methodology which is an EA developmental process based on TOGAF ADM is critical.
  • Ensure you understand the SAP recommended artifacts (Both Mandatory and optional artifacts) at each phase from Architecture vision to architecture change governance
  • Go through this wonderful blog from Rene de Daniel sharing the links on different artifacts and their usage in SAP EAF
  • Check the blog on SAP EAF to get a deeper understanding of SAP EA Framework
  • SAP offers various tools to access Reference Business Content (SAP RBA) and Reference Solution Content (SAP RSA). Familiarizing yourself with the functionalities of these tools, such as SAP Signavio, SAP Business Accelerator Hub, SAP EAD, etc., can prove beneficial. As a SAP Enterprise Architect, it is expected that you efficiently explore these tools for the most up-to-date business and solution contents

Architecture Vision and Roadmap

  • Ensure clarity regarding the steps involved in Architectural Vision and Roadmap, including essential architectural work products.
  • It is vital to share a common understanding of business strategy elements such as vision, goals, etc., and to comprehend the sustainable business model canvas. The exam aims to evaluate your approach to solving a business transformation use case and deriving the corresponding business model. Pay attention to the sequence of the Business Model Canvas (BMC).
  • Examine architectural principles, their underlying rationale, and Transition Architectures as part of your preparation.

Business architecture

  • Crucial: Familiarize yourself with both the capability-centric and process-centric approaches for developing the target architecture. Understand the methodology for transitioning from Baseline Business Architecture to Target Business Architecture.
  • Essential concepts like the Business Footprint Diagram, Gap Analysis, and Stakeholder Review must be thoroughly understood and mastered before undertaking the exam.

Data, Application, and Technology Architecture

SAP enterprise architects are anticipated to possess comprehensive knowledge of end-to-end SAP technologies, covering Data, Application, and Technology architecture along with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP PaaS). Gain a deep understanding of crucial topics including SAP Integration Solution Advisory Methodology, SAP Extension Methodology, SAP Clean Core Principles, Side-by-Side Extensions, Key User, and On-Stack Extensions, among others.

Integration architecture

The below guide offers comprehensive information on SAP ISA-M methodology, covering process integration, data integration, analytics, and Thing integration. Make sure to review the entire guide for a clearer understanding of SAP integration methodology and approach.

Integration architecture CIO guide

Extension architecture

Most SAP customers employ extension methodologies to expand SAP applications, encompassing key user extensibility, developer extensibility, side-by-side extensions, and more. It is essential to understand these diverse topics and how customers can leverage them for their specific scenarios. Familiarity with various options like SAP ABAP environment, SAP Build, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Event Mesh, Advanced Event Mesh, etc., would be beneficial. Refer to the provided guide for a comprehensive understanding of the end-to-end extension architecture.

Extensions in S/4HANA implementation-Clean core and BTP

Technology architecture

In your role as an enterprise architect, it is your responsibility to advise customers on IT architecture, determining factors such as the required number of instances and whether they should be global or regional based on the customer's business processes. Refer to the provided guide and blog link to gain a clearer understanding of how instance strategy functions.

S/4 HANA Transformation journey:

S/4HANA transition journey : A practical guide to senior leadership

Instance strategy blog

Data architecture

Ensure you have a clear understanding of the data and analytics products and solutions provided by SAP, including offerings like SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Data Intelligence, SAP Analytics Cloud, etc.

SAP has recently released Data and Analytics advisory methodology and recommended going through the blog to get more details

Exam day

The examination lasts for a duration of 3 hours, encompassing a total of 40 questions, divided into two segments (22 Multiple Choice Questions and 18 questions based on a case study). Familiarize yourself with the case study in advance, which you can find here

  • Select the best answers for all questions, including those you may be unsure of, as you may not have the opportunity to review them later. However, for uncertain answers, flag those questions so that, if time allows (which it typically does in most cases), you can revisit and modify your answers if necessary. In my experience, out of the 40 questions, 25 were easy, 10 were of moderate difficulty, and 5 were very challenging. It is crucial to thoroughly prepare in all the skill areas mentioned above, as you need to answer at least 32 questions correctly out of 40 to obtain certification!

What’s next after the exam

  • With SAP's acquisition of LeanIX, the closed-loop scenario of Business and IT transformation becomes achievable through the integration of SAP Signavio with LeanIX. SAP Signavio captures all business capabilities, seamlessly integrating with LeanIX to formulate Data, Technology, and Application architectures. Therefore, it is highly recommended to enhance your skills in LeanIX.
  • Attaining certification from one of the hyperscalers (AWS, GCP, or Azure) is advisable, as many of our RISE with SAP customers utilize these platforms. Obtaining advanced architect certification in one of these hyperscalers enhances your ability to engage in customer discussions regarding the implementation of S/4HANA on hyperscaler landscapes.
  • Upskilling in cutting-edge technologies such as Generative AI, Metaverse, and the Internet of Things is beneficial, as many leaders are turning to enterprise architects for advice and guidance on transforming their businesses with these technologies and developing a roadmap for their adoption.

All the best and thanks for reading!!! Reach out to me if you have any questions

entry.title: Re: The In-App Help Panel (Widget) for Ariba Guided Buyin...
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

There can be several reasons that SAP Companion does not work correctly, including incorrect configuration in Manager or an issue with the permissions of the user trying to use SAP Companion.  Without seeing your configuration in Manager it is impossible to day so the best option is for you to go through the Troubleshooting SAP Companion Community post and try to identify the issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Sessions around Enterprise Architecture and LeanIX @ Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
ERP106v | Charting your ERP transformation and future SAP software landscape (Strategy Talk)
Leverage the power of SAP Signavio and LeanIX solutions to optimize your business across multiple layers through your ERP transformation. Set up your SAP software landscape of the future, focused on extracting greater value from processes and applications, mitigating software risks, and taking an integrated approach to enhance your business.

ERP902v | Transforming business: SAP Signavio and LeanIX solutions
Leverage the power of SAP Signavio and LeanIX solutions to optimize your business across multiple layers through your ERP transformation. Set up your SAP software landscape of the future, focused on extracting greater value from processes and applications, mitigating software risks, and taking an integrated approach to enhance your business.
 
ERP170 | Drive value along your transformation journey with SAP Signavio and LeanIX
Discover an innovative approach to business transformation inspired by healthcare services provider Siemens Healthineers. With AI-powered SAP Signavio and LeanIX solutions, you can achieve rapid value delivery and process optimization, revolutionize transformation and enterprise architecture, and optimize efficiency and agility.
 
ERP900v | Future of cloud ERP with AI-driven transformation and fast-track adoption
Explore the latest tools and methodologies in the RISE with SAP offerring that help accelerate ERP transitions and time to value. See AI-driven innovations enabling organizations to efficiently drive business transformation with SAP Signavio and LeanIX solutions. Discover the GROW with SAP offering for swift, predictable cloud ERP adoption.

If you want to lean more, please also check out Signavio Business Transformation Suite and ERP Transformation.

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Stockholm
entry.content: Thank you for the interest. I've recorded your request and will assign it to a topic expert.  Please expect that they will be in touch in a few business days to discuss.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Java asynchronous event handlers
entry.content: Thanks Marc.

entry.title: Re: SAP Code Jam in Wroclaw
entry.content:
I've recorded your request. Our topic expert, Nico, will be in touch to discuss.

Thanks,
Thomas Jung

entry.title: HELP! Cost roll up does not roll component usage
entry.content:
Hi!

I need help in the new feature of Cost Roll Up

Operator works great, but i have some issues to roll up component value from an upstream node

Aggregated Unit Cost works fine with external receipts from vendors, also works fine working with aggregated production cost in LOC=SI04, PRODID=50000002, but in the next step that is production PRODID=55000002 at the same LOCATION, and the same RESOURCE, but diferent SOURCE ID, does not aggregate the unit cost of its previus component.

PRODID does have Component Usage, but does not aggregate cost

I´ve checked all Master Data and works fine in Supply Optimizer. ¿what could it be?

 The operator logs only shows that NAGCSTAGGREGATEDUNITCOST does not have desagregation factor, Weird, SAPIBP1 and CO2 carbon emiter does not have either.

i really need you help

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Code-Jam Request in New York
entry.content: I've recorded your request. I will need to discuss with our AI expert, but she is out of office this week.  Also Q4 might be difficult to schedule as there are already lots of events around TechEd planned then.  We might have to target December.  But please give us a bit of time to discuss and then we will get back with you.

entry.title: Singapore, Madrid & Phoenix: SAP ICC attended the 3 SAP Partner Summit for SME locations!
entry.content:
The biggest, the best and the most remarkable event is back! SAP Partner Summit for SME, SAP's premier event for SME segment, took place in 3 beautiful cities:

  • Singapore: March 12 - 13, 2024
  • Phoenix (AZ): April 10 - 12, 2024
  • Madrid: April 23 - 25, 2024

These events not only serve as a platform for our partners to directly hear from SAP experts but also serve as a great networking opportunity where SAP partners often connect among each other for business opportunities and collaborative ideas. In 2024 the tonic of the events was taking SAP Business One into a Cloud future and keep addressing the lower mid-market and small businesses with SAP Cloud offers around  #SAPBTP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition (GROW with SAP).

SAP Integration and Certification Center (SAP ICC) was present in the 3 events. In line with SAP's strategy it provides certifications for partner solutions which fit into the scenarios of GROW with SAP, SAP BTP and SAP Business One. As highlighted in an opening video recorded by Karl Fahrbach, SAP Chief Partner Officer, "when you build solutions with BTP, you can get them certified by SAP".

entry.title: SAP TCODES USAGE BY USERS
entry.content: Are there any efficient ways to find all users who just use just one tcode or few tcodes in SAP ABAP

entry.title: Re: Dimension Members are not appearing based on Validati...
entry.content:
@Vasu_Sac , from your description, I understand you would like having cascading effect on member selector based on validation rule, e.g. selecting a company code in one filter, and only the valid sales group should be shown in the second filter based on validation rule.  

Cascading effect based on validation rule is NOT supported in product. 

Sarau
